description_long: This is a modern front-loading washing machine with a sleek, dark metallic finish. The front features a large circular glass door, surrounded by a glossy black bezel, and a control panel above with a rotary dial, digital display, and several buttons. The left side and right side panels are embossed with geometric patterns for structural reinforcement. The rear view reveals water inlet and drain hoses, as well as access panels and connection points. The overall design is compact and robust, suitable for placement in urban environments such as apartment laundry rooms, garages, or utility spaces. The machine's exterior is primarily metal with some plastic and glass components, and the drum is partially visible through the front door.
description: A sleek, dark metallic front-loading washing machine with a large glass door and a modern control panel. The sides are embossed, and the rear shows hoses and connection points.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large circular glass door, glossy bezel, and a detailed control panel with a rotary dial, digital display, and buttons.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the embossed geometric pattern on the metal panel, with no visible controls or openings.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing water inlet and drain hoses, access panels, and connection points for utilities.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with the same embossed geometric pattern and no visible controls.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located at the top front of the machine, featuring a central rotary dial, a digital display to the right, and several push buttons arranged horizontally. Labels and icons are present for different wash settings.
attribute_door_type: Front-loading, circular glass door with a black bezel; the door has a visible handle integrated into the bezel.
attribute_brand_logo: A brand logo is visible on the upper left of the control panel, with the text 'SAMSUNG' in white.
attribute_detergent_drawer_location: The detergent drawer is visible on the upper left of the front panel, directly to the left of the control dial, with a horizontal pull-out design.
attribute_drum_visibility: The drum is partially visible through the transparent glass door, showing the metallic interior and central agitator.
